ddls:
CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "business_status" TEXT /* Business status of the establishment (e.g., OPERATIONAL, CLOSED) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the establishment (out of 5) */,
  "price_level" INTEGER /* Price level of the establishment (1-5) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the establishment's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the establishment's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the establishment */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the establishment is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the establishment is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the establishment's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the establishment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the establishment */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the establishment */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_type_assocs" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_type_assocs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES establishment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_type_assocs_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the session (e.g., search queries, viewed establishments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was executed */,
  "query_results" TEXT /* Results of the query (e.g., list of establishments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewed_establishments" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the establishment */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the establishment was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time the establishment was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewed_establishments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewed_establishments_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (out of 5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Text accompanying the rating (e.g., review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent establishment */,
  "child_establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_hierarchy_parent_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_hierarchy_child_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_tags_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the establishment */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the establishment */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the establishment */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the establishment's social media page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)
